MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Devendra Patel is present in pro per.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dale Naymik is present.
Attorney Matthew D. Show representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweitzer, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
